_comment: Plan 10 CVE-holdout manifest schema. Repos are referenced by commit
SHA + patch line spans, never vendored (see Asgard/Heimdall/evaluation/corpus.py).
CVE holdouts require a local checkout (`checkout_root`) supplied at
run time -- CI runs without network, so this seed manifest ships with
zero entries populated; curating the 50 CVE / 50 clean-repo corpus
called for in plan 10 s1 is tracked as follow-up work (needs network
access to clone/pin real OSS repos, out of scope for this harness
against this schema by test_corpus_manifest.py using a temp fixture
